description_long: This is a Seiko Coutura chronograph wristwatch with a robust, masculine design, featuring a black metal link bracelet and a round case. The dial is detailed with multiple subdials, blue accents, and a tachymeter bezel inscribed with city abbreviations for world time functionality. The face is protected by a glass crystal, and the case includes prominent pushers and a crown on the right side. The bracelet is composed of solid, polished links, giving the watch a sleek and modern appearance. The clasp is integrated and likely a fold-over style, matching the overall metallic finish. The watch exudes a sporty yet sophisticated aesthetic, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A Seiko Coutura chronograph wristwatch with a black metal link bracelet, blue-accented subdials, and a tachymeter bezel, combining sporty and elegant design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed dial with subdials, blue accents, tachymeter bezel, and visible Seiko branding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the case, the crown, and pushers, as well as the curvature of the metal bracelet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the metal bracelet and the clasp, with the case back partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth case profile and bracelet links, with no visible crown or pushers.
attribute_brand_logo: The Seiko logo is prominently displayed in white text at the top center of the dial, just below the 12 o'clock position.
attribute_dial_design: The dial features a chronograph layout with three subdials, blue accent rings, baton hour markers, and a tachymeter bezel with city abbreviations. The style is sporty and technical, with a multi-layered, detailed appearance.
attribute_strap_type: Black stainless steel link bracelet with solid, polished links and a robust construction.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands (hour, minute, second), three subdials for chronograph functions, and luminous elements on the hands and markers.
